22.kj: decision, diligent, (fine) gold, pointed things, sharp, threshing instrument, wall.
22.dv: or חָרֻץ; passive participle of H2782 (חָרַץ);

22.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
22.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

22.dv: from an unused root meaning apparently to be sticky (rather perb. a demonstrative); from H2894 (טוּא), through the idea of dirt to be swept away);
a collateral form mediating between H2775 (חֶרֶס) and H2791 (חֶרֶשׁ);

22.gl: to spread (a bed); by implication, to refresh

23.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
23.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

23.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
23.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

23.gl: a pot; also a thorn (as springing up rapidly); by implication, a hook
23.dv: or (feminine) סִירָה; or סִרָה; (Jeremiah 52:18), from a primitive root meaning to boil up;

23.gl: abstractly, a seasoning (with spicery); concretely, an unguentkettle (for preparing spiced oil)
a deep place (of water or mud)
23.dv: or מְצֹלָה; also מְצוּלָה; or מְצֻלָה; from the same as H6683 (צוּלָה);

24.gl: properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think, regard, value, compu
24.kj: (make) account (of), conceive, consider, count, cunning (man, work, workman), devise, esteem, find out, forecast, hold, imagine, impute, invent, be like, mean, purpose, reckon(-ing

24.gl: properly, the hind part; generally used as an adverb or conjunction, after (in various senses)
24.kj: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase]

24.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
24.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

24.gl: an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea or the subterranean watersupply)

24.dv: or (feminine) נְתִיבָה; or נְתִבָה; (Jeremiah 6:16), from an unused root meaning to tramp;

25.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
25.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

25.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
25.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
25.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

25.gl: properly, failure, i.e. nothing or destruction; usually (with preposition) without, not yet, because not, as long as, etc.
25.kj: corruption, ig(norantly), for lack of, where no...is, so that no, none, not, un(awares), without.

25.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
25.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.

25.gl: concretely, crushed; also afraid; abstractly, terror

26.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
26.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

26.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
26.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a
haughty, height, high(-er), lofty, proud, [idiom] exceeding proudly.

26.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to strut;
